title: Add ChatFlow app logo

requirements.text: Generate a ChatFlow app logo and display it on the login page above the app name. The logo should be a modern, minimal chat/messaging icon using teal/green accent colors consistent with the app's WhatsApp-inspired palette.
acceptanceCriteria: A logo image is generated and stored in frontend/public/assets/generated/
The logo is displayed on the LoginPage component above the 'ChatFlow' app name
The logo uses teal/green colors consistent with the existing app theme
The logo renders clearly on both light and dark backgrounds
The logo has appropriate sizing and spacing so it does not crowd other login page elements

constraints: Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
Logo colors must align with the existing teal/green WhatsApp-inspired palette defined in frontend/src/index.css
nonGoals: Adding a logo to the chat header or sidebar (only the login page for now)
Animated or SVG-based logo (static image only)

required: Modern minimal chat bubble icon with a teal/green gradient, two overlapping rounded speech bubbles, clean flat design on a transparent background (chatflow-logo.dim_256x256.png)
